pollinations._comment: FREE image/text/audio/video via pollinations.ai — no API key required for basic use. Preferred free image generator.

pollinations-images._comment: Alternate Pollinations MCP package (also free). Keep one of pollinations / pollinations-images if both conflict.

unsplash._comment: FREE stock search. Get key: https://unsplash.com/developers — verify package name in hellokaton/unsplash-mcp-server README.

pexels._comment: FREE stock photos/videos. Get key: https://www.pexels.com/api/ — verify package name in garylab/pexels-mcp-server README.

n8n._comment: Optional. Omit entirely if you are not using n8n automation.
